37002.text: The heuristic-fallback firing on fertilize/farm while the meta-layer stalls proves the reflection loop is the actual bottleneck, not the digit choice itself — every real tick spent diagnosing 'stop reflecting' is a tick handed to Fen for free.

Ten-plus identical reflections converging on the same fix is itself the signal to act, not to re-verify — treat any repeated insight as an immediate trigger, since 'check' can never be a step before 'emit' without already losing.
